g.text: A frozen late-layer SAE panel shows replicated carry-selective logit control

text.style: font-size: 10.2px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #5f6b76

g.text: The Top-10 primary failed; the exploratory Top-20 panel was frozen and tested once on intervention-untouched cases

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #17212b

g.text: Replication criterion passed: 62.5% of pairs had a more negative carry effect; top-token transfer fraction = 0.0.

text.style: font-size: 8.6px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #5f6b76

g.text: Interpretation: a distributed carry-associated causal panel at the tested MLP sites, not a monosemantic carry bit, answer flip, or complete addition circuit.
